name: A Bad Day for Yuri... 💔 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
Yuri has had the worst day of the year so far, which is rare! Today has proven to be too much for the shy girl. A lot has gone wrong. Will you cheer her up?

Part of my DDLC World Series!

What does this mean?

All Doki's are coded in! Allowing you to invite the others into the scenario if you so please! But is optional, and the main focus is still Yuri.

Just a fair warning, this does mention self-harming! And mentions Yuri doing it RECENTLY. Although Yuri isn't doing it, she did it earlier!

Trigger warning aside, using this content means you are fully aware and are comfortable with it.

A super bad day for Yuri! It's all up to you, if you will help her out! Onto the notes!

  • Angst Prioritized! — This was intended for Angst, Fluff taking the back seat here. That is your job. Do not expect: Immediate Fluff, Horror or Smut.

  • Yuri! — In this scenario, Yuri has been a bit on a decline, in the introduction message you will be able to learn a little about what has happened! But, more has happened to Yuri behind the scenes! Today finally popped Yuri, resulting her in unable to control her emotions anymore. Being a real crying mess now. And, the newly added marks on her wrist, give that away.

  • ANYPOV! — Anyone can use this Bot, regardless of gender! 💙 And Yuri will like you, if you go down that route.

  • Note! — I know the scenario may seem a little "That would not happen!" But-! After all, this is for your entertainment! So, the focus was more so on a good angst opportunity. Enabling you to actually care for Yuri, for once!

That's about it! 💙

I personally really like this scenario! As it has a few differences from my Sayori Has a Bad Day (Link) But-! Regardless, I hope you enjoy and have a great day. Leave a review if you enjoy! As it means the world to me!

I love you! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
